network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
forbidden: You don't have access to this action.
rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
server_error: Server error. Please try again later.

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.

backend.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters.
backend.PASSWORD_TOO_WEAK: Password must contain lowercase and uppercase letters, and a digit.
backend.PASSWORD_NOT_SET: Your account has no password set.
backend.PASSWORD_SAME_AS_CURRENT: New password must be different from the current one.
backend.EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address.
backend.EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists.
backend.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email to continue.
backend.EMAIL_SEND_FAILED: Failed to send the email. Please try again later.
backend.PHONE_INVALID: Please enter a valid phone number.
backend.PHONE_ALREADY_USED: This phone number is already linked to another account.
backend.TIMEZONE_INVALID: Please select a valid time zone.
backend.CODE_NOT_FOUND: No active code found. Please request a new one.

backend.CODE_EXPIRED: The code has expired. Please request a new one.
backend.TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
backend.RESEND_COOLDOWN: Please wait {{retry_after_sec}}s before requesting a new code.
backend.RESET_RESEND_COOLDOWN: Please wait {{retry_after_sec}}s before requesting a new reset code.
backend.SESSION_INVALID: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
backend.DELETE_CONFIRM_TEXT_INVALID: The confirmation text does not match.
backend.FORBIDDEN: You don't have access to this action.
backend.PLAN_NOT_FOUND: The selected plan does not exist or is inactive.
backend.PLAN_CHAT_HISTORY_NOT_AVAILABLE: Chat history is not available on your plan.
backend.PLAN_HISTORY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Your plan allows analyzing up to {{plan_limit_days}} days of history.
backend.PLAN_SUBSCRIPTION_FREQUENCY_TOO_HIGH: Your plan allows subscriptions no more often than once every {{min_subscription_interval_minutes}} minutes.
backend.FREE_TRIAL_SUBSCRIPTIONS_ALREADY_USED: Your trial subscription quota is used up. Upgrade to a paid plan to continue.
backend.TRIAL_SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED: Your trial subscription has expired. Upgrade to a paid plan to continue.
backend.FREE_SUBSCRIPTION_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: On the Free plan subscriptions cannot be deleted — you can only pause or resume them.
backend.TRIAL_SUBSCRIPTION_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: Trial subscriptions cannot be deleted manually.
backend.CHAT_REF_REQUIRED: Please specify a chat or channel.
backend.CHAT_LINK_REQUIRED: Please provide a username, chat/channel link, or numeric chat id.
backend.PARAMS_INVALID_JSON: Request parameters are not valid JSON.
backend.LLM_ERROR: The AI model failed to process the request. Please try again.
backend.TG_JSON_EXPORT_REQUIRED: A Telegram export JSON file (.json) is required.
backend.TG_JSON_INVALID: The file is not valid JSON.
backend.TG_JSON_NO_MESSAGES: The JSON file has no 'messages' field. The export may be in HTML format.
backend.TG_JSON_MESSAGES_NOT_LIST: The 'messages' field must be a list of messages.
backend.TELEGRAM_NOT_AUTHORIZED: Telegram is not connected. Please authorize first.
backend.TELEGRAM_ERROR: Telegram returned an error. Please try again.
backend.PHONE_NUMBER_INVALID: Please enter a valid phone number.
backend.PHONE_AND_CODE_REQUIRED: Phone number and confirmation code are required.
backend.PASSWORD_ENCRYPTION_CONTEXT_INVALID: Password encryption session is invalid. Please try again.
backend.PASSWORD_ENCRYPTION_CONTEXT_EXPIRED: Password encryption session has expired. Please try again.
backend.PASSWORD_DECRYPT_FAILED: Failed to decrypt the password. Please try again.
backend.TG_LOGOUT_FAILED: Failed to sign out of Telegram.
backend.TG_QR_STATUS_FAILED: Failed to check QR login status.
backend.INVITE_LINK_INVALID_OR_EXPIRED: The invite link is invalid or has expired.
backend.INVITE_RESOLVE_FAILED: Could not open the chat by invite link.
backend.INVITE_JOIN_FAILED: Failed to join the chat by invite link.
backend.INVITE_HANDLE_FAILED: Failed to process the invite link.
backend.CHAT_ENTITY_NOT_RESOLVED: The chat could not be resolved.
backend.NUMERIC_CHAT_ID_NOT_RESOLVED: Could not open a chat by numeric id. Try a username, public link, or invite link instead.
backend.PUBLIC_CHAT_NOT_FOUND: Public chat or channel not found.
backend.SERVICE_PUBLIC_ONLY: The service mode works only with public chats and channels.
backend.NO_FREE_ACCOUNT: All service accounts are currently busy. Please try again later.
backend.SERVICE_SESSION_NOT_FOUND: No active session for the service account.
backend.SERVICE_SESSION_DECRYPT_FAILED: Failed to read the service account session.
backend.FLOOD_WAIT: The service account is temporarily rate-limited by Telegram. Please try later.
backend.SERVICE_ACCOUNT_INTERNAL_ERROR: Service account failed to process the request.
